items.headline: Mag 7 earnings week opens Apr 27 with Iran/Hormuz futures slip (Dow -0.17%)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Mag 7 earnings week opens Apr 27 with Iran/Hormuz futures slip (Dow -0.17%) — 5 of 7 print Apr 29-30** — Previous report ended at Apr 24 NVDA $5.12T retake / AMD +13.9% / Intel +24% one-day. Now **Apr 27 futures-cap-tape acts as the gate to Q1 prints** with combined 2026 capex commentary from Alphabet / Amazon / Meta / Microsoft framing the entire "AI ROI" debate. Apple prints Apr 30. **Geopolitical risk (Hormuz closure, Iran ceasefire stall) re-enters as a tape-mover** for the first time since Apr 21.

items.headline: Hermes Agent v0.11.0 (Apr 23) "Interface"
items.diff_narrative: **New: Hermes Agent v0.11.0 (Apr 23) "Interface" — full React/Ink TUI, native AWS Bedrock, GPT-5.5 via Codex OAuth, 1,556 commits / 761 PRs from 29 contributors** — Previous report stated "Hermes Agent — no new release inside Apr 23-26 (continued post-v0.10.0 activity)." That was wrong: **Apr 23 v0.11.0 shipped** with Ink-based React rewrite of the interactive CLI, pluggable transport architecture, 5 new inference paths, 17th messaging platform (QQBot), shell hooks lifecycle system, webhook direct-delivery mode, configurable subagent orchestrator with file-coordination layer. **>95,600 GitHub stars in 7 weeks**.

items.headline: Sam Altman vs Anthropic Mythos "fear-based marketing" exchange (Apr 21, intensifying Apr 25-27) + Apr 16 attacks on Altman's home + Mythos contractor-URL leak via Discord
items.diff_narrative: **New: Sam Altman vs Anthropic Mythos "fear-based marketing" exchange (Apr 21, intensifying Apr 25-27) + Apr 16 attacks on Altman's home + Mythos contractor-URL leak via Discord** — Previous report covered Anthropic engineering postmortem on Apr 23 Claude Code regression. Now the **AI-public-opinion + frontier-lab-cap-table-coupling thesis collides with rising backlash**: Sam Altman accuses Anthropic of "selling a bomb shelter while threatening to drop a bomb"; physical attacks on Altman's home (Apr 16, prior); Bloomberg confirms a private Discord forum gained access to Mythos via contractor + URL-pattern guessing. CNBC Apr 15 quantifies souring public opinion on AI/datacenters into IPO season.

items.headline: CVE-2026-7037 Totolink A8000RU OS command injection (CVSS 9.8)
items.diff_narrative: **New: CVE-2026-7037 Totolink A8000RU OS command injection (CVSS 9.8) — public PoC + CVE-2026-6951 simple-git RCE (CVSS 9.8) hits foundational CI/CD dep on Apr 26** — Previous report covered SGLang CVE-2026-5760, ASP.NET Core CVE-2026-40372, and the Pillar Antigravity sandbox-escape. Now Apr 26 daily roll-up adds **CVE-2026-7037 (Totolink A8000RU pptpPassThru OS-command-injection, public exploit available)** and **CVE-2026-6951 (simple-git Node.js RCE in widely-deployed CI/CD library, foundational dep across countless pipelines)**. Apr 27 adds **CVE-2026-33277 (LogonTracer OS-command-injection, CVSS 8.8)** and **CVE-2026-42363 (GeoVision GV-IP Device Utility credential leak, CVSS 9.3)**.

items.headline: Project Glasswing roster confirmed at 12 launch partners + 40 critical-infrastructure orgs
items.diff_narrative: **New: Project Glasswing roster confirmed at 12 launch partners + 40 critical-infrastructure orgs** — Previous report did not enumerate. Now confirmed: **AWS, Apple, Broadcom, Cisco, CrowdStrike, Google, JPMorganChase, Linux Foundation, Microsoft, NVIDIA, Palo Alto Networks, Anthropic**, plus 40 additional orgs maintaining critical software infrastructure. ProMarket (Apr 22) flags antitrust risk.

items.headline: AI Dev 26 x SF (Apr 28-29) at Pier 48 confirmed at 3,000+ devs hosted by Andrew Ng
items.diff_narrative: **New: AI Dev 26 x SF (Apr 28-29) at Pier 48 confirmed at 3,000+ devs hosted by Andrew Ng** — Previous report listed AI Dev 26 + AI Tinkerers VIP dinner generically. Now venue + scale + curriculum confirmed: **Pier 48 Shed A Mission Bay**; tracks on **Agentic AI, Context Engineering, Multimodal AI Apps, AI Governance, Coding-with-AI**; **AI Startup Track** included. Stanford Causal Science Conference: Frontiers in AI Evaluation lands Apr 29.

items.headline: Okta for AI Agents GA Apr 30 (3 days out from Apr 27 dateline)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Okta for AI Agents GA Apr 30 (3 days out from Apr 27 dateline) — pre-GA blueprint reaffirmed** — Previous report covered Okta GA timing. Apr 27 = **3-day countdown**: Agent Discovery & Governance (sanctioned + shadow agents), Agent Gateway as central MCP control plane (virtual MCP server aggregating Okta MCP registry), credential vaulting + auto-rotation, universal-logout runtime enforcement.

items.headline: OpenClaw v2026.4.25-beta train (Apr 26 beta.3 → beta.4 → beta.7+) extends through Apr 27
items.diff_narrative: **Continuing: OpenClaw v2026.4.25-beta train (Apr 26 beta.3 → beta.4 → beta.7+) extends through Apr 27** — Previous report ended at OpenClaw v2026.4.25-beta beta.7+ on Apr 26 afternoon. Continuation: voice-stack hardening, browser-automation safe-tab URLs, CDP-native role-snapshot fallback, CLI image-gen --background option, Discord voice channels.discord.voice.model override, plugin-onboarding install-record preservation. Sub-24h beta cadence persists.

items.headline: DeepSeek V4-Pro / V4-Flash
items.diff_narrative: **Continuing: DeepSeek V4-Pro / V4-Flash — Hugging Face traction grows Apr 25-27, Simon Willison Apr 24 piece "almost on the frontier, a fraction of the price"** — Previous report covered V4 launch + Bloomberg-via-CCTV Huawei Ascend tuning. Now Simon Willison's Apr 24 deep-read "DeepSeek V4 — almost on the frontier, a fraction of the price" stays the canonical practitioner reference Apr 25-27. V4-Pro Hugging Face page is live.
